case_title: WAYNE M DERMAN VS. AT INTERNATIONAL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DERMAN, WAYNE M AS TO DEFENDANT AT INTERNATIONAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
